issues.description: TrashFromHand is optional ('You may trash') but DSL structure makes it mandatory. Should use conditional logic or optional flag.
Rest action should not be nested in thenActions of TrashFromHand. Rest is a separate requirement of the activation cost, not conditional on trashing.
SearchDeck filter is 'Any' but should be restricted to {Revolutionary Army} type cards only. Also missing 'look at 3 cards' mechanic and 'place rest at bottom in any order' action.
SearchDeck only reveals/draws 1 card but does not handle the remaining 2 cards from the 3-card look. Missing explicit action to return non-chosen cards to bottom of deck in any order.
